example: She likes to sip her tea slowly to savor the flavor.

He satisfied his thirst with a refreshing glass of lemonade after mowing the lawn.
She dropped a couple of ice cubes into her glass of lemonade to make it refreshing.

She ordered a Bloody Mary with extra spice and a celery stick as a garnish.
